# Printomaniac

> Quality destination for high-performance printers and reliable printer accessories.

## Overview
Printomaniac is a premier online retailer specializing in precision printing hardware, including laser printers, inkjet printers, and professional workstations. We provide nationwide delivery across the USA.

## Key Information
- **Website:** https://printomaniac.com
- **Core Products:** All-in-One Printers, Laser Printers, Inkjet Printers, Thermal Printers, Large Format Printers, and Accessories.
- **Service Area:** Nationwide USA
- **Support Email:** info@printomaniac.com

## Pages
- [Home](https://printomaniac.com/) - Overview of top products and featured collections.
- [Shop](https://printomaniac.com/shop) - Full product catalog with filtering by category and brand.
- [About Us](https://printomaniac.com/about) - Our mission and commitment to quality printing solutions.
- [FAQ](https://printomaniac.com/faq) - Common questions about shipping, warranty, and orders.
- [Contact](https://printomaniac.com/contact) - Support and inquiry form.

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend:** React with Vite
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Interactions:** Framer Motion, Lucide Icons
- **Payments:** PayPal Integration
- **Backend:** Hostinger-hosted API
